entities.name: Careerspan

entities.name: JD-from-Voice Workflow
entities.context: Process using short founder/VC voice notes to generate JDs, live Careerspan job experiences, and starter candidate packs

entities.context: Strategic decision to position sourcing + quality as Careerspan's central value proposition with disciplined economics

entities.name: Pattern Break Demo Strategy

entities.name: Owner-Aligned JD
entities.context: Job description generated from voice notes that reflects the hiring manager's own language and nuanced requirements

entities.name: Starter Candidate Pack

entities.name: Live Careerspan Job Experience

relationships.context: Founder and owner of product/GTM decisions
Owns the workflow, using voice notes from founders/VCs as raw input
Responsible for technical execution of the workflow
Champions sourcing + quality as central value proposition for Careerspan
Handles implementation and economics of full-database sourcing runs
Favors memorable demos that couple Careerspan value to stakeholder language over generic SaaS demos
Voice notes are transformed into JDs reflecting the hiring manager's language
